pageContext.name: Ross Geller 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: The first release in our FRIENDS™ Chibi® Coin Collection features our favorite paleontologist, Ross Geller™, from the hit TV series. Naturally, there will be more FRIENDS to come!  Officially licensed in partnership with Warner Bros. Consumer Products, this gleaming piece is made from 1oz of pure silver and is shaped and colored to resemble Ross as Chibi art. The obverse of the coin bears the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II, confirming it is a legal tender coin.   Each coin comes safely stored in a FRIENDS™ branded case and includes a large window, making it perfect for display. A Certificate of Authenticity is printed at the back of the box alongside the coin's unique serial number in the mintage of just 2,000.   Grab yours today and relive the treasured memories of this 90's classic!
